{{Infobox group
| name = Masons
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Masons Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Masons, also known as [[the House]] of Masons, are a respected order within the [[Consultant's Guild]]. Based in a gray headquarters on [[Gray Island]] that is designed to blend into its surroundings, the organization functions as an intelligence-gathering body. Unlike the [[Architects]] who remain on the [[island]] to rule, Masons are sent out into the world to harvest knowledge for the [[Am’haranai]]. They specialize in undercover infiltration, utilizing professional expertise and disguises to embed themselves into various roles such as merchants, scholars, laborers, or guards. This allows them to act as insiders who relay information back to the [[Consultant's Guild]]. The Masons operate through a rigorous training process that begins in childhood. The order hosts hundreds of children, each learning a different profession to ensure they can be perfectly positioned when information is needed. While highly skilled at maintaining cover, some members have been noted for struggling with the boundary between their true selves and their roles, occasionally becoming too attached to their subjects or losing themselves in their personas. The order is led by a [[High Mason]], such as [[Yala]], and maintains its own strict laws. Although they are part of a larger guild structure, the Masons view themselves as a family rather than an army.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Employed within [[Fletcher]]'s [[workshop]], the Masons function as a group of professional consultants who provide reports and local information. Operating out of a gray headquarters, these specialists relay data to the [[Consultant's Guild]] and host two hundred and thirty-seven students. While they have been known to pose as guards and wear long [[Blackwatch]] coats, they are also viewed as vital forces that could be lost. Within their ranks, the figure known as [[Yala]] is regarded as a legend.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Masons]] provide reports.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are a group employed in [[Fletcher]]'s [[workshop]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are mentioned as forces that could be lost.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] provide information in the area.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Masons]] have a headquarters that is a gray building.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are trained as professionals in actual fields and relay information to the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Masons]] are a group of [[Consultants]] that host two hundred and thirty-seven students.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Masons]] were posing as guards.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] wear long [[Blackwatch]] coats.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala]] is considered a legend among the [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Masons]] specialize in undercover infiltration.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Masons]] lay foundations.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Masons]] were preparing for war.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Masons]] are a [[Guild]] led by [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Masons are a group of spies who operate by hiding among ordinary, unconscious citizens and faking sleep to remain undetected. Appearing as unremarkable civilians, they work alongside [[Shera]] and are secretly part of [[Bareius]]'s recruits. During operations, these agents are positioned within the [[Imperial Palace]] to spread discontent through the use of news-sheets. The [[House]] of Masons is characterized by its wood-and-plaster walls.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]] are a group that [[Shera]] signals and works with during operations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]] can hide among ordinary unconscious citizens.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]] can fake sleep.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]] are spies, not assassins.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s [[Masons]] are secretly part of [[Bareius]]' recruits.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s [[Masons]] are ordinary-looking civilians.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Masons]] are positioned in the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Masons]] were positioned to spread discontent with news-sheets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[House]] of [[Masons]] has wood-and-plaster walls.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"The Architects design the plans, the Masons lay the foundation, the Shepherds watch the flock, and Gardeners remove the weeds."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
